name: PRESIDENTIAL CHARCOAL BURGUNDY PAISLEY SHIRT
description: A commanding long-sleeve presidential shirt in charcoal grey with intricate burgundy and silver paisley motifs. Premium cotton with a subtle sheen, pointed collar, and tailored fit — ideal for boardrooms, weddings, and formal evenings in Nairobi.

name: PALADIN IMPERIAL MAROON PAISLEY PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Paladin pure-cotton presidential shirt in rich maroon with royal purple and gold paisley swirls. Safari silhouette with shoulder epaulettes, pleated front panels, and dual patch pockets for a regal, structured look.

name: ROYAL BLUE GOLD PAISLEY SAFARI PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Luxury safari-style presidential shirt in deep royal blue with shimmering gold paisley. Four flap pockets, buttoned epaulettes, and a silk-like finish for occasions that demand presence.

name: EMERALD MOSAIC PRESIDENTIAL PATCHWORK SHIRT
description: Statement presidential shirt with a tiled patchwork of paisley, floral, and houndstooth blocks in teal, navy, and cream. High-standing collar and polished satin finish for gala events and VIP occasions.

name: REGAL GEOMETRIC SAFARI PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Structured safari presidential shirt with a refined geometric oval print in muted grey and blue. Four utility pockets, epaulettes, and a crisp tailored drape for professional and ceremonial wear.

name: PRESIDENTIAL AZURE PAISLEY TAILORED SHIRT
description: Signature Presidential brand shirt in vibrant azure blue with navy paisley and subtle gold accents. Slim tailored fit, contrast black buttons, and premium woven texture for sharp formal style.

name: PRESIDENTIAL GOLDEN PAISLEY LONG-SLEEVE SHIRT
description: Bold Presidential collection shirt with large-scale gold and mustard paisley on a textured charcoal ground. Elegant sheen, pointed collar, and sleek black buttons — a centerpiece for luxury wardrobes.

name: MANDELA LEGACY ROYAL PAISLEY PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Heritage-inspired presidential shirt with ornate blue and gold paisley on a heathered purple-maroon base. A cultured statement piece linked to the Living the Legacy collection — perfect for celebrations and formal gatherings.

name: ELITE BLACK GOLD MONOGRAM PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Opulent black shirt with all-over gold baroque monogram pattern, white contrast placket, and gold-trimmed cuffs. Slim fit luxury dress shirt for parties, proms, and black-tie-adjacent events.

name: MAJESTIC SILVER BAROQUE PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Radiant satin-finish shirt in silver-white with black and silver baroque scrollwork on chest, sleeves, and hem. Polished silver buttons and a commanding silhouette for the modern gentleman.

name: PRESIDENTIAL CAMEL MONOGRAM SHIRT
description: Refined short-sleeve presidential shirt in warm camel with tonal geometric monogram pattern. Structured cotton, chest pocket, and clean button placket — smart casual luxury for warm-weather events.

name: IMPERIAL NAVY GOLD MOSAIC PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Presidential patchwork shirt pairing navy, gold, and silver tiles of paisley, floral, and houndstooth. High-standing collar and satin sheen — designed for men who lead from the front.

name: PRESIDENTIAL CHARCOAL PAISLEY SIGNATURE SHIRT
description: Presidential brand dress shirt in charcoal with silver-blue paisley and burgundy undertones. Premium woven cotton, classic collar, and understated black buttons for elevated everyday elegance.

name: ROYAL SILVER BLUE PAISLEY PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Elegant presidential shirt in cool silver-blue paisley with white-trimmed cuffs. Available in M through 3XL. A versatile formal piece that pairs effortlessly with navy trousers and leather loafers.

name: MANDELA IMPERIAL MULTI PAISLEY SHIRT
description: Vibrant heritage shirt blending royal blue, gold, purple, and maroon paisley on a textured heather base. Nelson Mandela Foundation inspired detailing — a culturally significant presidential statement piece.

name: PRESIDENTIAL AZURE GOLD MOTIF SHIRT
description: Presidential shirt in bright azure and gold with African-inspired curved motifs on a micro-check base. Culturally rich pattern, tailored fit, and premium cotton for distinguished casual-formal wear.

name: LUXURY BLACK GOLD BAROQUE PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: High-fashion presidential shirt in black with gold baroque embroidery, white contrast placket, and ornate chest crest. A red-carpet ready piece for hosts, grooms, and executives.

name: OPULENT SILVER BAROQUE PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Lustrous silver-white shirt with dramatic black and silver baroque panels on shoulders, sleeves, and hem. Satin hand-feel and polished buttons — pure presidential grandeur.

name: IMPERIAL NAVY GOLD PATCHWORK PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Regal patchwork presidential shirt in navy, gold, and silver with paisley, floral, and geometric tiles. High collar profile and tailored drape for formal receptions and state-style occasions.

name: PALADIN GOLD PAISLEY GUAYABERA SHIRT
description: Paladin pure-cotton guayabera in mustard gold with brown and white paisley. Vertical pleats, four patch pockets, and shoulder epaulettes — heritage craftsmanship with modern presidential flair.

name: PRESIDENTIAL PAISLEY SAFARI SHIRT
description: Bold safari presidential shirt with red and black paisley on a textured white base. Four flap pockets, epaulettes, and structured cotton — authority and artistry in one garment.

name: MIDNIGHT SILVER PAISLEY PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Monochrome luxury shirt in black with silver-grey paisley and floral filigree. Subtle sheen, bronze-trimmed cuffs, and slim fit — understated power dressing for evening events.

name: ROYAL BURGUNDY GOLD BAROQUE PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Show-stopping burgundy satin shirt with gold baroque embroidery, black contrast stripe, and jewelled black buttons. Regal formalwear for weddings, galas, and presidential-tier occasions.

name: ROYAL BLUE IMPERIAL PAISLEY SHIRT
description: Deep royal blue jacquard shirt with black-highlighted paisley weave and satin finish. Slim fit, dark buttons, and barrel cuffs — a refined choice for formal dinners and corporate leadership.

name: PALADIN OCHRE PAISLEY PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Paladin ochre presidential shirt with chocolate and cream paisley swirls. Pleated front, four pockets, epaulettes, and 100% cotton — heritage safari elegance reimagined for Prince Esquire.

name: CRIMSON ONYX PAISLEY SAFARI SHIRT
description: Striking safari presidential shirt in crimson, onyx, and white paisley. Four button-flap pockets, epaulettes, and structured cotton for a bold yet polished presence.

name: MIDNIGHT SILVER FLORAL PAISLEY SHIRT
description: Tailored dress shirt in black with dense silver paisley-floral pattern and elegant sheen. Discreet black buttons and modern slim fit — sophisticated monochrome luxury.

name: ROYAL BURGUNDY BAROQUE PRESIDENTIAL SHIRT
description: Burgundy satin presidential shirt with symmetrical gold baroque chest panels, black central stripe, and textured gold cuffs. Commanding formal piece for hosts, speakers, and celebration wear.
